name: coordinating-herdr-agents
description: Coordinate Codex and Claude Code sessions through Herdr with audited handoffs and a local activity trail.

interface.shortDescription: Audited Herdr coordination for parallel agent work
interface.longDescription: Discover active work, avoid duplicate sessions, send source-attributed handoffs, and inspect local coordination events while keeping Herdr as the coordination layer.
defaultPrompt: Use Herdr Agent Coordination before editing in this shared worktree.
Inspect active Herdr agents and coordinate any overlapping work.
Send an audited Herdr handoff to the agent that owns this work.
